# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t1 = ADD 5, 3
      STORE t1, [a]
      t2 = SUB 10, 4
      STORE t2, [b]
      t3 = MUL 6, 7
      STORE t3, [c]
      t4 = DIV 20, 4
      STORE t4, [d]
      t5 = MOD 17, 5
      STORE t5, [e]
      LOAD t6, [a]
      LOAD t7, [b]
      t8 = ADD t6, t7
      LOAD t9, [c]
      LOAD t10, [d]
      t11 = MUL t9, t10
      LOAD t12, [e]
      t13 = DIV t11, t12
      t14 = SUB t8, t13
      RETURN t14
